title: Software Test Engineer
responsibilities: create and maintain test cases; automate regression and smoke checks; document defects and collaborate with engineering teams
requirements_text: We are looking for a middle specialist with hands-on experience in testing, jira, sql, postman, cypress. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: LaunchPoint is hiring a middle software test engineer to support validating product quality through manual and automated testing.
raw_text: Vacancy V048: Software Test Engineer at LaunchPoint. Location: Kyiv. Employment: contract. Required experience: 2.0 years. Required skills: testing, jira, sql, postman, cypress, api testing, playwright, python. Optional skills: bug reporting, test planning. Responsibilities: create and maintain test cases; automate regression and smoke checks; document defects and collaborate with engineering teams.
